candidate_llm_application: LLM adapter composition with cooperative effects: stack LoRA adapters such that activating one site cooperatively modifies the effective rank at distant layers; Hill-coefficient analog for adapter interaction strength.

results.title: Lora Adapter Composition: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on LoRA adapter composition, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
